property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: cleanupExpiredTokens_removesOnlyExpiredRecords
testcase.system-out:
22:04:44.436 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.activities.AuthFlowIntegrationTest]: AuthFlowIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 22:04:44.584 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.activities.ActivitiesBackendApplication for test class com.example.activities.AuthFlowIntegrationTest

FKlvo0euvixu1daou4f1ik5a3g Hibernate: alter table if exists public.user_preference_activity_counts drop constraint if exists FKr6g9cbxduqr7r26lqrdqs4pmp Hibernate: alter table if exists public.user_preference_category_preferences drop constraint if exists FKmjnj38y7m1bnaxfnymk6jfy5v Hibernate: alter table if exists public.user_preference_venues drop constraint if exists FKeimot30nj3jt0qwy352nsvv1a Hibernate: drop table if exists public.activities cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.activity_participants cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.activity_tags cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.activity_waitlist cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.activity_historys cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.broadcasts cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.categorys cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.certificates cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.check_ins cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.favorites cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.feedbacks cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.notifications cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.notification_settings cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.reminders cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.tags cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.user_preference_activity_counts cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.user_preference_category_preferences cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.user_preference_venues cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.user_preferences cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.users cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists public.verification_tokens cascade Hibernate: create table public.activities ( max_participants integer, category varchar(255), coordinator_id varchar(255), created_at varchar(255), created_by varchar(255), date varchar(255), description TEXT, end_time varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, start_time varchar(255), status varchar(255) check (status in ('DRAFT','PUBLISHED','CANCELLED','COMPLETED')), title varchar(255), updated_at varchar(255), venue varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table public.activity_participants ( activity_id varchar(255) not null, user_id varchar(255) ) Hibernate: create table public.activity_tags ( activity_id varchar(255) not null, tag_id varchar(255) ) Hibernate: create table public.activity_waitlist ( activity_id varchar(255) not null, user_id varchar(255) ) Hibernate: create table public.activity_historys ( cancelled_at timestamp(6), registered_at timestamp(6) not null, activity_id varchar(255) not null, activity_title varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, status varchar(255) not null, user_id varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table public.broadcasts ( email_failed_count integer not null, email_sent_count integer not null, recipient_count integer not null, send_email boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, sent_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), status varchar(20) not null, target_role varchar(20) not null, type varchar(20) not null, title varchar(180) not null, created_by varchar(255) not null, failure_reason TEXT, id varchar(255) not null, message TEXT not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table public.categorys ( id varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table public.certificates ( id varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table public.check_ins ( checked_in_at timestamp(6), checked_out_at timestamp(6), activity_id varchar(255), checked_in_by varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, user_id varchar(255), user_name varchar(255), primary key (id), constraint uk_checkins_activity_user unique (activity_id, user_id) ) Hibernate: create table public.favorites ( created_at timestamp(6), activity_id varchar(255) not null, id varchar(255) not null, user_id varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table public.feedbacks ( id varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table public.notifications ( id varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table public.notification_settings ( id varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table public.reminders ( id varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table public.tags ( color varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table public.user_preference_activity_counts ( count integer, category varchar(255) not null, preference_id varchar(255) not null, primary key (category, preference_id) ) Hibernate: create table public.user_preference_category_preferences ( score integer, category varchar(255) not null, preference_id varchar(255) not null, primary key (category, preference_id) ) Hibernate: create table public.user_preference_venues ( preference_id varchar(255) not null, venue varchar(255) ) Hibernate: create table public.user_preferences ( average_rating_given float(53), total_activities integer, updated_at timestamp(6), day_preference varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, time_preference varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table public.users ( is_active boolean default false not null, is_verified boolean default false not null, created_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), email varchar(255) not null, id varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255) not null, password varchar(255) not null, role varchar(255) not null, primary key (id), unique (email) ) Hibernate: create table public.verification_tokens ( failed_attempts integer not null, used boolean not null, token varchar(6) not null unique, expiry timestamp(6) not null, last_sent_at timestamp(6) not null, locked_until timestamp(6), id varchar(255) not null, user_id varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists public.activity_participants add constraint FK4jh3y144aog87xobqjb3yaca9 foreign key (activity_id) references public.activities Hibernate: alter table if exists public.activity_tags add constraint FK1r8b8lam10su8u5op97sw99kq foreign key (activity_id) references public.activities Hibernate: alter table if exists public.activity_waitlist add constraint FKlvo0euvixu1daou4f1ik5a3g foreign key (activity_id) references public.activities Hibernate: alter table if exists public.user_preference_activity_counts add constraint FKr6g9cbxduqr7r26lqrdqs4pmp foreign key (preference_id) references public.user_preferences Hibernate: alter table if exists public.user_preference_category_preferences add constraint FKmjnj38y7m1bnaxfnymk6jfy5v foreign key (preference_id) references public.user_preferences Hibernate: alter table if exists public.user_preference_venues add constraint FKeimot30nj3jt0qwy352nsvv1a foreign key (preference_id) references public.user_preferences 2026-04-27T22:04:49.971+05:30 INFO 4152 --- [activities-backend] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-04-27T22:04:50.532+05:30 INFO 4152 --- [activities-backend] [ main] o.s.d.j.r.query.QueryEnhancerFactory : Hibernate is in classpath; If applicable, HQL parser will be used. 2026-04-27T22:04:51.623+05:30 WARN 4152 --- [activities-backend] [ main] .s.s.UserDetailsServiceAutoConfiguration :
Using generated security password: 409dd915-374d-475a-9e50-e5478b229660
This generated password is for development use only. Your security configuration must be updated before running your application in production.

testcase.name: resendOtpWithinCooldown_doesNotIssueNewToken
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select vt1_0.id, vt1_0.expiry, vt1_0.failed_attempts, vt1_0.last_sent_at, vt1_0.locked_until, vt1_0.token, vt1_0.used, vt1_0.user_id from public.verification_tokens vt1_0 Hibernate: delete from public.verification_tokens where id=? Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.email, u1_0.is_active, u1_0.is_verified, u1_0.name, u1_0.password, u1_0.role, u1_0.updated_at from public.users u1_0 Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.email, u1_0.is_active, u1_0.is_verified, u1_0.name, u1_0.password, u1_0.role, u1_0.updated_at from public.users u1_0 where upper(u1_0.email)=upper(?) Hibernate: insert into public.users (created_at, email, is_active, is_verified, name, password, role, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select vt1_0.id, vt1_0.expiry, vt1_0.failed_attempts, vt1_0.last_sent_at, vt1_0.locked_until, vt1_0.token, vt1_0.used, vt1_0.user_id from public.verification_tokens vt1_0 where vt1_0.user_id=? and not(vt1_0.used) order by vt1_0.expiry desc fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: delete from public.verification_tokens vt1_0 where vt1_0.user_id=? Hibernate: select vt1_0.id from public.verification_tokens vt1_0 where vt1_0.token=? fetch first ? rows only 2026-04-27T22:04:53.139+05:30 INFO 4152 --- [activities-backend] [ main] c.e.a.service.VerificationService : Verification email sent to cooldown@example.com Hibernate: insert into public.verification_tokens (expiry, failed_attempts, last_sent_at, locked_until, token, used, user_id, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) testcase.name: otpLockoutAfterMaxFailedAttempts_blocksCorrectOtpTemporarily
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select vt1_0.id, vt1_0.expiry, vt1_0.failed_attempts, vt1_0.last_sent_at, vt1_0.locked_until, vt1_0.token, vt1_0.used, vt1_0.user_id from public.verification_tokens vt1_0 Hibernate: delete from public.verification_tokens where id=?
